name: 前端页面全量迁移至 shadcn
desc: 18 pages + 40 组件文件全量从原生元素+自定义组件迁到 shadcn primitives,按域拆并行 subtask(settings/platforms/groups/logs/stats/skills/mcp/home/top-level)
contracts: 仅换 UI 渲染层 (JSX+className): Tauri invoke 调用 + 参数名 + i18n key + 业务逻辑 + props 契约零改 (memory ts-protocol-rust-serde-sync)
modal/confirm 走 shadcn Dialog/AlertDialog/Sheet (Radix Portal), 禁原生 confirm/beforeunload
数值格式化走 utils/formatters.ts, 禁页内重复定义 (CLAUDE.md)
导航本地 state + utils/navGuard.ts, 禁 react-router (CLAUDE.md)
8 语言 i18n key 零改 (check-i18n 过); 迁完删旧自定义 CSS 类不留死代码
组件测试改测行为不测实现 (findByRole/交互断言), 禁断言 className/内部 DOM 结构; PlatformCard/BalanceBar/CompactCard/StatChip/CostTrendChart 测试迁后改写

m-settings 含 components/settings/editors/ 全部 15 文件 (StatusLineSection/子目录 + FieldRenderer/EnvEditor/PermissionsSection/HooksSection/HooksSectionInline/PluginsSection/icons/hooks-types/preview + SandboxSection/ImportDiff/_shared), 非仅 design 初列 3 个
i18n theme.color.{appleBlue/solarized/rosePine/tokyoNight/oneDark/material/github/nightOwl} 8 个死 key 从 8 locale 文件清; theme.style.* 全保留

subtasks.name: 迁移 settings 域
subtasks.desc: AppSettings/Settings/CodexSettings/TrayConfigTab/PopoverConfigTab + components/settings/* (SchedulingSettings/MiddlewareRules/CodingToolsSettings/MitConfig/CcSwitchImport/NotificationSettings/SectionAnchorNav/editors/SettingsHeader/Sub2ApiImport/NotificationEventList/UnsavedChangesModal + editors/SandboxSection/ImportDiff/_shared): 原生 button/input/select/textarea→shadcn 表单; 自定义 tab→Tabs; UnsavedChangesModal→Dialog; 编辑器表单用 Field/FieldGroup
验收: 无残留原生 button/input/select/textarea (grep 验证)
tabs→shadcn Tabs (trigger 在 list 内)

subtasks.name: 迁移 platforms 域
subtasks.desc: Platforms + pages/platforms/* + components/platforms/* (PlatformCard/SmartPasteModal/BatchDeleteModal/BatchOverrideModelsModal/BatchMoveGroupModal/BatchSetStatusModal/ShareModal): 表单→shadcn; 各 Modal→Dialog/AlertDialog; 批量操作 confirm→AlertDialog; 状态徽标→Badge; PlatformCard.test.tsx 测试过
验收: 批量 confirm 走 AlertDialog (非原生 confirm)

subtasks.name: 迁移 groups 域
subtasks.desc: Groups.tsx (37K) + pages/Groups/*: 平台列表/拖拽/统计卡片; 拖拽保留 dnd-kit (SortableList 内部 button 换 shadcn); 统计卡→Card+Badge; 操作菜单→DropdownMenu

subtasks.name: 迁移 logs 域
subtasks.desc: Logs.tsx + RequestLog.tsx + pages/Logs/*: 日志列表/详情/过滤; 表格→Table 或列表; 过滤→FilterDropdown 换 shadcn Select/Combobox; 详情抽屉→Sheet

subtasks.name: 迁移 stats 域
subtasks.desc: Stats.tsx (32K) + PricingTab.tsx + CostTrendChart: 统计卡片→Card+StatChip(Badge); 图表区保留 (CostTrendChart 若需 shadcn chart 按需 add); 数值格式化仍走 utils/formatters.ts

subtasks.name: 迁移 skills+mcp 域
subtasks.desc: Skills/SkillDetailView/SkillInstallView/Mcp + pages/Skills/* + pages/Mcp/*: 列表→Card; 详情→Tabs; 安装流程→Form+Dialog; 操作→Button+DropdownMenu

subtasks.name: 迁移 misc 域 (Home/About/Notifications/ModelTestPanel/CliProxy/shared)
subtasks.desc: Home/About/Notifications/ModelTestPanel/CliProxy + components/shared (StatChip/BalanceBar/CompactCard/CopyButton/TestResultBody/FilterDropdown): StatChip→Badge; CompactCard→Card; CopyButton→Button; 删 shared/Modal.tsx (走 Dialog); BalanceBar/StatChip/CompactCard 测试过

subtasks.name: 迁移顶层 (App/Sidebar/PopoverCards/UpdatePromptModal/SortableList)
subtasks.desc: App.tsx + Sidebar.tsx + PopoverCards.tsx + UpdatePromptModal.tsx + SortableList.tsx: 侧栏导航保留本地 state (禁 react-router); PopoverCards→Popover; UpdatePromptModal→Dialog; SortableList 内 button 换 (dnd-kit 保留)

subtasks.name: 迁移 src/domains/ (6 tsx 697 行)
subtasks.desc: domains/platforms/* (MockConfigEditor/SearchableProtocolSelect/ProtocolLogo) + domains/groups/* (PlatformPicker/GroupTestPanel/GroupIcon): 原生表单→shadcn, var() 旧引用改投 shadcn token (若 infra 批量改名已处理则校验), 图标按需换 lucide
验收: var() 引用指向 shadcn token

subtasks.name: 迁移 popover 独立窗口 (src/popover.tsx + popover.css)
subtasks.desc: src/popover.tsx (8K, Tauri popover 第二 ReactDOM root) + popover.css (293 行): 入口组件 UI 迁 shadcn, popover.css 旧自定义类清/改 tailwind token; 该入口共享主题系统验证切换生效
验收: popover.css 旧类清理到 tailwind token
主题切换在 popover 窗口生效

subtasks.name: cleanup: m-settings 遗留 + 删 Modal.tsx
subtasks.desc: 修 CodingToolsSettings.tsx:426/464 SelectItem value="" -> __none__ 哨兵; SegmentEditModal.tsx 自研 Modal -> shadcn Dialog 去 shared/Modal 消费; grep 确认 Modal.tsx 无消费者后删除 Modal.tsx; yarn build + test 过

subtasks.name: fix: i18n 3 key + SelectItem 空值 8 处
subtasks.desc: 补 group.deleteFailed/saveFailed/setDefaultFailed 3 key 到 8 locale (zh-Hans/en-US/ar-SA/fr-FR/de-DE/ru-RU/ja-JP/es-ES); 修 HooksSection.tsx:125,355 / HooksSectionInline.tsx:117,245 / FieldRenderer.tsx:86 / EnvEditor.tsx:61 / PermissionsSection.tsx:202 的 SelectItem value=__none__ 哨兵 + 双向映射; yarn build + test + check-i18n 过
